     Regenerate with: python scripts/gen_docs_reference.py -->

# CLI reference

Every `lancedb-robotics` command group and subcommand, generated from the Typer application. Invoke as `lancedb-robotics <group> <command> [options]`.

## `align`

Create multi-rate temporally aligned observation views.

### `align create`

Create a deterministic aligned observation view and record lineage.

## `bench`

Run reproducible benchmark harnesses for training data access.

### `bench prepare-lerobot`

Prepare a public LeRobot dataset for benchmark runs.

### `bench public-dashboard`

Rebuild the retained public LeRobot benchmark history dashboard.

### `bench publish-public-lerobot`

Publish retained public LeRobot benchmark artifacts.

### `bench run`

Run the reproducible benchmark harness and emit a structured report.

### `bench run-public-lerobot`

Run and retain the public LeRobot benchmark artifact set.

### `bench validate-public-lerobot`

Validate retained public LeRobot benchmark artifacts and claims.

## `curate`

Curate, sample, mine, and snapshot scenario selections.

### `curate compare`

Compare two curated snapshot branches.

### `curate compare-plan`

Plan a comparison: required tables, versions, estimated scan, executor need.

### `curate comparison`

Reload a persisted comparison report by id or snapshot-pair alias.

### `curate comparison-members`

Page a comparison's full added/removed/shared id list (bounded reload).

### `curate comparison-staleness`

Report whether a persisted comparison's source tables have advanced.

### `curate comparisons`

List persisted curation comparison reports from the catalog (newest first).

### `curate compile-row-plan`

Compile saved-view decisions into a row-grain training plan.

### `curate compose-snapshot`

Apply decisions and freeze a curated training snapshot.

### `curate decide`

Record saved-view membership decisions.

### `curate dedup`

Plan/apply semantic dedup over scenario windows.

### `curate diversity`

Sample a semantically diverse scenario snapshot.

### `curate eval-metric-staleness`

Report whether an eval metric's recorded source tables have advanced.

### `curate eval-metrics`

List imported eval metrics from the indexed catalog (newest first).

### `curate feedback-from-eval`

Import eval metrics and link them to a curated snapshot.

### `curate index-predicates`

Build or inspect scalar indexes for curation saved-view hot paths.

### `curate materialization-report`

Record copy accounting for a boundary projection/export.

### `curate membership-history`

Inspect saved-view membership decisions with as-of replay semantics.

### `curate mine-failures`

Mine nearest failure/outlier neighbors into a snapshot.

### `curate next-candidates`

Create next curation candidates from eval regressions.

### `curate promote-snapshot`

Record a promote/reject decision for a curated snapshot branch.

### `curate prune-comparisons`

Apply the comparison retention lifecycle (active -> archived -> pruned).

### `curate prune-eval-metrics`

Apply the eval-metric retention lifecycle (active -> superseded -> pruned).

### `curate quality-filter`

Filter scenarios by quality flags and optional quality score.

### `curate review-queue`

Create and export logical review queues.

### `curate save-view`

Persist a logical curation view without copying payload rows.

### `curate stratified-sample`

Create a balanced per-slice scenario snapshot.

### `curate sync-eval-metrics`

Rebuild the eval metric catalog from model_outputs (pre-0095 lakes, drift repair).

### `curate trace-membership`

Explain why a scenario is included in or excluded from a snapshot.

## `dataset`

Create reproducible dataset snapshots from search results.

### `dataset export`

Export a dataset snapshot as a materialized boundary projection.

### `dataset materialization-summary`

Compare planned projection copy costs before materializing an export.

### `dataset project`

Open, plan, or materialize an external-format dataset projection.

### `dataset snapshot`

Create and manage dataset snapshots.

## `embed`

Create observation-level embedding columns (image/pixel vectors).

### `embed observations`

Embed camera-frame payloads into a per-observation vector column.

## `episodes`

Derive and inspect first-class episode boundaries and frames.

### `episodes derivations`

List, dry-run, rebuild, supersede, and clear episode derivations.

### `episodes from-markers`

Derive episodes from explicit start/stop marker events.

### `episodes from-query`

Mine episodes around events matching a firing condition.

### `episodes from-scenarios`

Promote scenario windows or a snapshot selection into physical episodes.

### `episodes import-intervals`

Import externally authored episode intervals from JSONL or CSV.

### `episodes mine`

Mine episodes from frame, event, label, or model-output predicates.

## `export`

Export selected clips back to MCAP and replay-tool workflows.

### `export mcap`

Export a snapshot's scenario windows as MCAP clips plus a manifest.

## `gaps`

Analyze distribution gaps and balance reports.

### `gaps compact`

Compact old report/comparison bodies while retaining audit metadata.

### `gaps compare`

Compare an observed snapshot against an external distribution manifest.

### `gaps get`

Fetch a persisted distribution report body by id.

### `gaps latest`

Fetch the newest non-compacted distribution report matching filters.

### `gaps list`

List persisted distribution reports from the catalog.

### `gaps measure`

Measure a deterministic distribution report over a lake source.

## `ingest`

Register sources and ingest robot logs into canonical lake rows.

### `ingest lerobot`

Ingest a LeRobot dataset into canonical episodes, observations, and videos.

### `ingest lerobot-checkpoint-hold`

Create a first-class hold over matching LeRobot checkpoint rows.

### `ingest lerobot-checkpoint-release-hold`

Release a first-class LeRobot checkpoint hold.

### `ingest lerobot-checkpoint-retention`

Dry-run or apply retention for durable LeRobot ingest checkpoints.

### `ingest lerobot-checkpoint-retention-plan`

Plan LeRobot checkpoint retention scale and policy recommendations.

### `ingest lerobot-checkpoint-retention-schedule`

Run one scheduler-friendly LeRobot checkpoint retention pass.

### `ingest lerobot-claim-recover`

Abandon or steal a stale durable LeRobot ingest claim.

### `ingest lerobot-claim-recovery-simulate`

Simulate LeRobot stale-claim recovery crash points and scale risk.

### `ingest lerobot-claim-watchdog`

Dry-run stale LeRobot ingest claim watchdog and recovery plan.

### `ingest lerobot-job`

Show one durable LeRobot ingest job and its checkpoint history.

### `ingest lerobot-jobs`

List latest durable LeRobot ingest jobs.

### `ingest lerobot-media-inspection-timeout-plan`

Recommend LeRobot media-inspection timeout and retry settings from telemetry.

### `ingest mcap`

Register an MCAP file as a source and ingest it into canonical lake rows.

### `ingest rosbag`

Register a ROS1 `.bag` or ROS2 sqlite `.db3` source and ingest it.

## `inspect`

Inspect robot log files (MCAP first) without ingesting.

### `inspect lerobot`

Describe a LeRobot dataset without ingesting it.

### `inspect lerobot-object-store-conformance`

Probe LeRobot object-store auth, listing, metadata, and ingest preflight behavior.

### `inspect mcap`

Describe an MCAP file or split recording (topics, counts, range) without ingesting.

### `inspect rosbag`

Describe a ROS1 `.bag` or ROS2 sqlite `.db3` source without ingesting.

## `lake`

Create and manage a LanceDB robotics lake.

### `lake init`

Create the canonical lake tables (idempotent, ingests nothing).

### `lake maintain`

Compact fragments, refresh indexes, and prune unpinned old versions.

### `lake tables`

List canonical tables with row counts and schema versions.

## `lineage`

Refresh and traverse canonical lineage graph provenance.

### `lineage apply-retention-policy`

Expand an active policy into explicit artifact holds; --apply to write.

### `lineage attach-refs`

Attach external metadata-system references to run manifest rows.

### `lineage audit`

Audit lineage references, retained versions, and cleanup candidates.

### `lineage audit-reports`

List persisted lineage audit reports newest-first.

### `lineage backfill-external-context`

Index external run/job context from canonical rows into the catalog (idempotent).

### `lineage check-adapter`

Check whether an optional metadata-system adapter package is installed.

### `lineage checkpoint`

Trace a model checkpoint/run to its snapshot, slice rows, and source logs.

### `lineage conformance`

Run the metadata-plugin conformance suite; exit non-zero on any failure.

### `lineage cypher`

Run a Cypher query over the lineage graph (optional 'graph' extra, backlog 0099).

### `lineage evidence-events`

List evidence-pack audit events (creation, materialization, retention, expiry).

### `lineage evidence-retention`

Report which recorded packs are protected vs safe to expire.

### `lineage expire-evidence`

Delete a catalog entry (refused if protected unless --force).

### `lineage expire-external-context`

Delete a recorded external-context row (refused if held unless --force).

### `lineage export-audit-findings`

Export findings from a persisted lineage audit report as JSON or NDJSON.

### `lineage export-datahub`

Emit DataHub-style upstream/downstream lineage JSON from the graph.

### `lineage export-evidence`

Export a deterministic source evidence pack manifest.

### `lineage export-openlineage`

Emit OpenLineage RunEvent JSON for canonical lineage executions.

### `lineage export-rebuild-plan`

Emit a deterministic orchestrator handoff payload; --dispatch to record it.

### `lineage export-replay`

Export a deterministic, viewer-openable replay bundle from an evidence pack.

### `lineage export-retention-state`

Project policy + resolved-hold state out for external governance systems.

### `lineage export-urns`

Export the bulk artifact-URN catalog: id, backend URN, kind, table, digest.

### `lineage external-context-events`

List external-context audit events (backfill, retention, redaction, expiry).

### `lineage find-external-context`

Resolve external run/job handles to canonical executions/artifacts (paged JSON).

### `lineage get-audit-report`

Reload a persisted lineage audit report by id or digest.

### `lineage impact`

Traverse downstream dependents for an artifact handle.

### `lineage index-plan`

Report required/present/missing lineage predicate indexes as an actionable plan.

### `lineage invalidate`

Record an invalidation marker on a lineage artifact.

### `lineage list-evidence`

List catalog entries newest-first, filtered and paginated.

### `lineage list-rebuild-plans`

List recorded rebuild plans newest-first, filtered and paginated.

### `lineage list-retention-policies`

List recorded retention policies newest-first, filtered and paginated.

### `lineage materialize-evidence`

Materialize a recorded pack's blobs to a local/object-store destination.

### `lineage plugins`

List registered metadata-integration plugins, capabilities, and availability.

### `lineage rebuild-plan`

Emit an ordered rebuild/invalidations plan as JSON or tree text.

### `lineage rebuild-plan-events`

List rebuild-plan audit events (recording, status transitions, dispatch).

### `lineage record-evidence`

Build a plan-only evidence pack and record it in the durable catalog.

### `lineage refresh`

Project canonical lake rows into lineage graph tables (incremental by default).

### `lineage release-retention-policy`

Clear the holds a policy applied, leaving manual/other-policy holds; --release to write.

### `lineage resolve`

Resolve a handle to lineage roots with ambiguity/staleness diagnostics.

### `lineage resolve-retention-holds`

Merge policy-applied and artifact-local holds into maintenance's pin shape.

### `lineage resolve-urn`

Resolve an exported external URN back to a canonical lineage artifact id.

### `lineage retention-expiration-notices`

Report time-based holds that have expired or are expiring soon.

### `lineage retention-policy-events`

List retention-policy audit events (recording, status, apply/release, expiry).

### `lineage save-rebuild-plan`

Build a rebuild plan and record it in the durable catalog (idempotent by digest).

### `lineage save-retention-policy`

Record a retention policy in the durable catalog (idempotent by digest).

### `lineage set-evidence-retention`

Update retention/protection metadata for a recorded pack.

### `lineage set-rebuild-status`

Move a recorded rebuild plan to a new lifecycle status (optimistically).

### `lineage set-retention-status`

Move a recorded retention policy to a new lifecycle status (optimistically).

### `lineage show-evidence`

Reload a catalog entry (and optionally its manifest) by digest or subject.

### `lineage show-rebuild-plan`

Reload a catalog entry (and optionally its stored plan) by id or digest.

### `lineage show-retention-policy`

Reload a catalog entry (and optionally its stored definition) by id or digest.

### `lineage trace`

Trace upstream provenance for an artifact handle.

### `lineage upstream`

Alias for `lineage trace`.

## `quality`

Validate required streams and manage quarantine results.

### `quality validate`

Validate ingested runs against a quality profile and quarantine failures.

## `scenarios`

Create searchable scenario/clip windows over ingested runs.

### `scenarios create`

Create deterministic scenario windows over ingested runs.

### `scenarios enrich`

Attach captions and embeddings to scenario rows.

### `scenarios index`

Build a persistent ANN vector index over a scenario embedding column.

### `scenarios index-fts`

Build or refresh the persistent FTS index over scenario summaries.

## `search`

Search scenarios and camera frames with scalar, text, vector, hybrid, and image queries.

### `search hybrid`

Hybrid text + vector search fused by reciprocal rank fusion.

### `search image`

Find camera frames matching a text description (text->image similarity).

### `search scalar`

Filter scenarios by scalar metadata (no scoring).

### `search text`

Full-text search over scenario summaries (BM25).

### `search vector`

Vector similarity search over scenario embeddings.

## `train`

Preview dataset snapshots as training datasets.

### `train checkpoints`

List model-artifact/checkpoint manifests (deterministic paging).

### `train conformance`

Enterprise training conformance matrix and fault-injection run.

### `train evals`

List evaluation-run manifests (deterministic paging).

### `train expire`

Delete a manifest row; refuses protected rows unless --force is passed.

### `train metrics`

Look up eval aggregate/slice metrics by key (uses the materialized index).

### `train permutation`

Back a snapshot plan with LanceDB's native Permutation reader (projection + tensor formats).

### `train plan`

Build and page Enterprise server-side row-plan artifacts.

### `train preview`

Preview a snapshot as a training dataset.

### `train prewarm`

Inspect, retry, and cancel durable Enterprise cache-prewarm JobRuns.

### `train remote`

Inspect Enterprise remote training setup.

### `train report`

Query persisted Enterprise training loader/backend report history.

### `train retention`

Report which manifests are protected (lineage/feedback/snapshot) vs deletable.

### `train runs`

List training-run manifests (deterministic paging by created_at, id).

### `train sync-metrics`

Rebuild the materialized evaluation_run_metrics surface from evaluation_runs.

### `train tracker`

Sync manifests with external experiment trackers (import/export/drift).

### `train warm`

Query-driven cache warming: warm exactly what training reads via queries.

## `video`

Encode and inspect codec-aware camera video frames.

### `video conform-source`

Run decoded source-MP4 frame conformance checks.

### `video encode`

Encode camera videos with GOP/keyframe metadata.

### `video inspect`

Inspect codec-aware video encoding rows.

## `writeback`

Import labels, model outputs, and feedback into the closed loop.

### `writeback downstream-run`

List downstream labels, model outputs, and feedback for one run.

### `writeback feedback`

Record fleet, simulation, incident, or review feedback signals.

### `writeback labels`

Import labels from a labeling-tool/export JSON file.

### `writeback model-outputs`

Ingest model predictions/inferences from a JSON file.

### `writeback trace-model-output`

Trace one model output back to its input, snapshot, source run, and transforms.
